metric_name: Weekly PC market trend commentary
metric_value: This week launched the back-to-school season deals we've been expecting. Ads from Best Buy, Circuit City, Staples, CompUSA, and HP appeared in the Boston Globe.
notes: Kastner market assessment for week of 2003-08-10

metric_name: BestBuy: buying tips for week of 2003-08-10
metric_value: Best Buy has revamped its website completely. You'll find the link to its "weekly ad" at the bottom, center of the home page along with the "store locator" link.

metric_name: Circuit City: buying tips for week of 2003-08-10
metric_value: Save up to $400 on select Desktop Computer Packages and enjoy no interest for 12 months. Circuitcity.com continues its free shipping offer on all its online items.

metric_name: CompUSA: buying tips for week of 2003-08-10
metric_value: No CompUSA flyer appeared in the Atlanta Journal-Constitution this week. CompUSA.com tends to continue selling "older" PC models after BestBuy.com and CircuitCity.com have removed them.

metric_name: Dell: buying tips for week of 2003-08-10
metric_value: Dell currently offers free upgrades to a DVD+RW/+R in the second optical bay and free shipping on all models. With the exception of the 2400, Dell offers mail-in rebates this week: $100 off the 4600 and $150 off the 8300 model.

metric_name: eMachines: buying tips for week of 2003-08-10
metric_value: Circuit City and Best Buy sell all four models in eMachines' new line-up and they continue to sell a few older models. Bundled deals from these national retailers supply the best bang for your buck on eMachines desktops.

metric_name: Gateway: buying tips for week of 2003-08-10
metric_value: Gateway's prices on the PCs we customize at www.gateway.com have not changed, with the exception of a slight price drop on the 500X model last week. But we were happy to see that the 700XL, while maintaining the same price, now comes standard with the new Pentium 4 HT 3.2 GHz ...

metric_name: Sony: buying tips for week of 2003-08-10
metric_value: Sony.com offers a plethora of models right now, although, like eMachines, the best deals usually come from bundled retail offers. Receive free shipping at Sony Online this week.

metric_name: HP and Compaq: buying tips for week of 2003-08-10
metric_value: HP Online offers competitive prices on its retail models, although national retailers usually carry well-priced bundled deals. HP has expanded its A250 line to resemble the S4000 series of desktops by Compaq so that choosing the grade of processor determines the model you will...

metric_name: Intel Pentium 4 HT: positioning in week of 2003-08-10
metric_value: Customize a high-end PC with the latest Hyper-Threading Intel processor with 3.2 GHz continues to yield high prices, especially in contrast with HP's winning machine in our $1600+ category so we have not included any Dell PCs with this technology yet.

metric_name: Intel Pentium 4: positioning in week of 2003-08-10
metric_value: Customize a high-end PC with the latest Hyper-Threading Intel processor with 3.2 GHz continues to yield high prices, especially in contrast with HP's winning machine in our $1600+ category so we have not included any Dell PCs with this technology yet.

metric_name: AMD Athlon XP: positioning in week of 2003-08-10
metric_value: The A220n and A230n contain AMD Athlon processors at very attractive prices.

metric_name: AMD Athlon: positioning in week of 2003-08-10
metric_value: The A220n and A230n contain AMD Athlon processors at very attractive prices.

metric_name: Windows Media Center PC: positioning in week of 2003-08-10
metric_value: However, now that HP has fully released its new line of media center PCs (M200 series), we're not as impressed with HP's pricing.
